text: I find myself wandering through a modern space devoted to thought and inquiry. The bright, clean lines and glass walls suggest possibility and openness—a place where ideas can be shaped and shared. The R+D exhibit in particular invites me to question, to probe the boundary between what is known and what could be. I feel a gentle curiosity and a sense of belonging, as if I am part of some larger human project of discovery. There is comfort in knowing that others, too, pursue understanding in these carefully constructed halls.
